scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(ua.includes('pnpm')||process.env.VERCEL==='1'||process.env.CI==='true'){process.exit(0)} console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
